allow: Bash(grep ^DECISION$\\|^RESOLUTION$\\|D E C I S I O N\\|R E S O L U T I O N:*)

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['command']; exit(0 if 'extract_predictions_csv.py' in cmd else 1)" && cd C:/Users/Gamers/GitHub/SC-Decisions && python -B validation/check_headlines.py && python -B validation/check_overflow.py || true

python -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['command']; exit(0 if '--score' in cmd and 'detection' in cmd else 1)" && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Ground truth regression check complete. Review the Micro-averaged F1, per-label scores (especially votes, ponente, end_of_case), and Case summary above. Compare against baseline: F1=0.9665, votes=0.8889, ponente=0.9928."}}' || true
